name: io.github.codespar/mcp-izipay
description: MCP server for Izipay — Peru's enterprise acquirer (Niubiz). Card authorize/capture/refund, tokenization, cuotas, reconciliation.

environmentVariables.name: IZIPAY_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Izipay merchant username issued with your acquirer contract

environmentVariables.name: IZIPAY_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Izipay merchant password used to obtain JWT

environmentVariables.name: IZIPAY_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Environment: sandbox or production. Defaults to production.

environmentVariables.name: IZIPAY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Izipay API base URL. Defaults per IZIPAY_ENV. Override if your contract issues a custom host.
